About myself

Software engineer by professon but I love to code and develop anything that peaks my interest. Here is an overview of my education and my professional career life.

Leapfrog 2019 - present
Associate Software Engineer

Work and develop sotware/programs that is maintainable and clean that incorporates new technologies and progrmming languages. Worked on various projects across multiple team members for synergic resutls.

Strong Digital 2017 - 2019
Junior Web Dev

Fullstack role that maintain and developed web-based projects and mobile applications. Frontend and backend roles were taken up as and when needed, worked together with various different clients to meet their expectations.
